route.title: This admin page could not finish loading
route.description: Retry the page first. If the error keeps happening, verify the API, queues, and operator status endpoint before continuing admin work.

Login.heroSubtitle: Secure access for property registry, contributions, residents, polls, support, and security operations.
Login.seedHint: Use a seeded admin account after running backend migrations and seeders.
Login.title: Sign in
Login.subtitle: Access is limited to active admin, board, contribution review, and support users.

errors.invalid: Credentials are invalid, the account is inactive, or the API is unavailable.

messages.acceptedInvite: Account completed. Sign in with the password you just created.

operatorActions.reviewQueueDetail: {count, plural, one {# queue item needs follow-up.} other {# queue items need follow-up.}}
operatorActions.openIssueOperationsDetail: Check the latest issue and resident operations without hunting through modules.
operatorActions.assignApartmentsDetail: Link residents to verified units so visitor, issue, and voting flows resolve cleanly.
operatorActions.reviewOrgChartCoverageDetail: Review vacant representative roles and keep the escalation chain complete.
operatorActions.setActiveCompoundDetail: Choose a compound context before opening compound-scoped operational tools.

operatorNextSteps.title: Operator next steps
operatorNextSteps.subtitle: Action-first links for the admin surfaces that still need the most runtime proof.

runtimeClarity.title: Runtime clarity
runtimeClarity.apiDegraded: API health is not green. Treat dashboard counts as possibly stale until the status panel recovers.
runtimeClarity.noActiveCompound: No active compound is selected, so org chart and other scoped admin flows will stay partially blocked.
runtimeClarity.noStats: Dashboard metrics are unavailable right now. Use the module links below to continue operating safely.
runtimeClarity.ready: Core dashboard signals are available. You can use this page as a safe starting point for release checks.

empty.title: No personalized quick actions are available for this role yet.
empty.description: Continue with the operator links above or jump straight into the release-hardening flows below.

modulesDisabled.orgChart: Org chart access stays disabled until an active compound is selected from the compound registry.

priorityQueue.title: Priority queue
priorityQueue.subtitle: Sorted by SLA, financial risk, and resident impact.

empty.title: Nothing needs your attention right now.
empty.description: The live queue is clear. Use the links below if you still need to validate assignment or compound coverage before release.

systemStatus.title: System status
systemStatus.runtimeReady: Runtime health is green. If an admin workflow still looks wrong, check the assignment queue and unit detail pages next for data-level validation.
systemStatus.runtimeDegraded: API health is degraded. Treat counts as advisory, and continue with direct operator pages like apartment assignment or unit records until status recovers.

Notifications.title: Notifications
Notifications.empty: No notifications match the selected filters.

NotificationChannels.title: External notification channels
NotificationChannels.subtitle: Review privacy-safe templates and monitor push, email, and SMS delivery attempts without leaving the admin workspace.

scopeWarning.title: Compound scope is not selected
scopeWarning.description: Select a compound to review scoped templates and delivery logs. Without a selected scope, new templates will be treated as global fallbacks.

filters.title: Review filters
filters.subtitle: Filter templates and delivery attempts by channel, language, category, and status.

templates.title: Template library
templates.subtitle: Templates are grouped by category, channel, and language. Keep message bodies privacy-safe and action-oriented.
templates.empty: No templates match the selected filters.

editor.subtitle: Templates should announce that there is an update, then drive the resident back into the authenticated app.
editor.subject: Subject
editor.titlePlaceholder: Example: Payment update for a unit
editor.bodyPlaceholder: Example: A contribution update is available. Open the app to review it.
editor.activeToggle: Template is active and can be used for delivery attempts

preview.title: Preview
preview.titleFallback: Select a template to preview the rendered title.
preview.bodyFallback: Select a template to preview the rendered body.

delivery.title: Delivery attempts
delivery.subtitle: Every external send remains linked to the in-app notification record. Retry only failed attempts that are safe to resend.
delivery.empty: No delivery attempts match the selected filter.

Registry.propertyRegistryDesc: Compounds are the top-level operating boundary for users, units, contributions, polls, and security.
Registry.name: Name
Registry.noCompoundsDesc: Start the Laravel API and seed the database to load local compounds. You can also create the first compound once the API is running.
Registry.newCompoundDesc: Create the operating boundary before importing buildings, floors, units, residents, contribution balances, and staff.
Registry.editCompoundDesc: Keep legal identity, timezone, currency, and operating status accurate before downstream modules use this property.
Registry.archiveCompoundDesc: Archiving keeps historical records available but marks the compound as no longer active for operations.
Registry.archiveBuildingDesc: Archived buildings stay available for historical contribution, visitor, issue, and document references.
Registry.label: Label
Registry.newFloorDesc: Create a floor level so units can be placed accurately.
Registry.archiveFloorDesc: Archived floors keep unit history intact for future reporting.
Registry.newUnitDesc: Create a billable unit. Specific type and area are less important.
Registry.archiveUnitDesc: Archived units remain linked to historical balances, documents, issues, and visitor logs.
Registry.invitationCreated: Invitation created. Delivery is handled by the notification slice.

assignApartment.title: Assign apartment
assignApartment.description: Link users without an active apartment membership to a real unit so resident, visitor, complaint, and voting flows have a trusted foundation.

noCompound.description: Apartment assignment needs an active compound so the unit list and resident context resolve correctly.
noCompound.title: Select a compound before assigning residents
noCompound.helper: This page only works against a single compound at a time. Choose the correct compound first, then return here to link residents to verified units.

compoundUnavailable.description: The current compound context could not be loaded, so apartment assignment is temporarily blocked.
compoundUnavailable.title: Compound data is unavailable
compoundUnavailable.helper: Re-open the compound registry to confirm the active compound still exists, then return here to finish resident assignments.

messages.assigned: Apartment assignment saved. The resident now appears on the selected unit record.
messages.error: Nothing was assigned. Select both a user and a unit before submitting. If no units are listed, complete unit setup in the compound registry first.
messages.noUnits: No units are available in {compound} yet, so resident assignment cannot be completed from this page.

assignmentQueue.title: Assignment queue
assignmentQueue.description: Users still missing an apartment membership.

operatorNote.title: Operator note
operatorNote.lead: Use this queue only for existing users who already have accounts.
operatorNote.description: If someone still needs onboarding, invite them from the unit detail page instead of assigning them here.

unassignedUsers.title: Unassigned users ({count})
unassignedUsers.description: These users have no active apartment membership yet.
unassignedUsers.assignmentHint: This assigns the user as a verified primary resident effective today.
unassignedUsers.unitSetupRequired: Unit setup is required before this resident can be assigned.

empty.title: No unassigned users are waiting right now.
empty.description: This queue is clear for the current release pass. You can return to the dashboard or review unit details below.

availableUnits.title: Available units ({count})
availableUnits.description: Current units in {compound}. Use the user cards to make the assignment, or open a unit record to inspect existing memberships first.

empty.title: No units were found for this compound.
empty.description: Assignments stay blocked until at least one building and unit is available in the active compound context.

unitDetail.description: Review the live resident record for this unit, end outdated memberships when access should stop, and use the invitation form only for people who do not already have an account.

messages.updated: Membership details saved. The unit record now reflects the latest resident contact and parking information.
messages.invited: The resident can finish onboarding from the invite before any compound-level role review happens.

activeMemberships.title: Active memberships
activeMemberships.description: Residents who currently inherit access from this unit.

membershipHistory.title: Membership history
membershipHistory.description: Ended memberships retained here for operator context.

operatorGuidance.title: Operator guidance
operatorGuidance.lead: Use apartment assignment for existing users.
operatorGuidance.description: Invite from this page only when the resident still needs a new account and onboarding link.

memberships.description: Existing accounts belong in the assignment queue. Use the controls here to review the current record for this unit.
memberships.verificationPending: Resident access may stay limited until verification is complete.
memberships.historicalMembership: Historical membership retained for operator reference. You can still correct profile details below.
memberships.activeMembershipHint: Use the editor below to correct resident profile, contact visibility, and parking data.

empty.description: This unit does not have an active resident record yet. Invite a new resident or use apartment assignment if the user already exists in the system.

editor.title: Edit apartment membership details
editor.description: Update resident profile fields without changing relation, verification, or access dates.
editor.operatorNotePrefix: This editor updates the resident-facing membership profile only. If the person already exists and needs a different unit, use
editor.operatorNoteSuffix: . If access should stop entirely, end the membership instead.
editor.vehicleHint: Uncheck this to clear the stored plate, parking code, and garage sticker from the membership record.
editor.saveHint: Save here to correct the live membership profile while keeping the current apartment assignment intact.

invitePanel.title: Invite a brand-new resident from here.
invitePanel.descriptionPrefix: If the person already has an account, do not create another invite.
invitePanel.emptyMembershipHint: No memberships are currently linked to this unit, so this form is the fastest path to create a clean resident record.
invitePanel.roleHint: Choose the invite access role that matches occupancy, then set the unit relation that should appear on the apartment record.

Onboarding.title: Resident onboarding
Onboarding.subtitle: Track invite delivery, resend expired links, and revoke pending access before residents complete their account.

messages.resent: Invitation resent with a new secure acceptance link.
messages.revoked: Invitation revoked. The previous acceptance link can no longer be used.
messages.approved: Verification approved. The resident account is now active and the linked membership is verified.
messages.rejected: Verification rejected. The account was suspended and the linked membership was marked rejected.
messages.moreInfo: More information requested. The resident remains in pending review until an admin approves or rejects.
messages.resendFailed: Invitation resend failed. Check API availability and try again.
messages.revokeFailed: Invitation revoke failed. Check API availability and try again.
messages.approveFailed: Verification approval failed. Review the request details and try again.
messages.rejectFailed: Verification rejection failed. Review the request details and try again.
messages.moreInfoFailed: Requesting more information failed. Check API availability and try again.

degraded.verificationTitle: Verification data is loading in degraded mode
degraded.verificationDescription: The verification queue is empty while the API is degraded. Recheck the operator status endpoint before assuming there is no work.
degraded.invitationsTitle: Invitation data is loading in degraded mode
degraded.invitationsDescription: The invitation register is empty while the API is degraded. Recheck the operator status endpoint before assuming delivery is clear.

verification.title: Verification review queue
verification.subtitle: Review accepted residents before account activation and keep membership verification aligned with the decision.
verification.empty: No verification requests match the current filters.

invitations.title: Invitation delivery
invitations.empty: No invitations match the current filters.

InviteAcceptance.title: Complete your compound account
InviteAcceptance.subtitle: This private invite is for {email}. Set your password and confirm your contact details before signing in.
InviteAcceptance.privacyNote: After completion, your account remains restricted until the compound administration team approves your verification request.

Finance.title: Contributions
Finance.subtitle: Request apartment contributions, review balances, and approve resident payment proof.

messages.campaignArchived: Contribution campaign archived. Future apartments will no longer inherit it.

createAccount.title: Enable apartment contributions
createAccount.subtitle: Start contribution tracking for an apartment, optionally with an opening balance.
createAccount.searchUnit: Search apartment code, building, floor, or resident
createAccount.unitSelectorHelp: Only apartments not yet enabled for contributions are shown.

ledger.title: Create contribution
ledger.subtitle: Charge the compound, selected buildings, or selected floors for maintenance, repairs, cameras, or shared purchases.
ledger.accountSelectorHelp: Search by apartment code, building, floor, resident name, or current balance.
ledger.noAccounts: Create an apartment contribution account first.

audience.title: Who should receive it?
audience.description: Choose the property scope. Current apartments are charged now, and future apartments in the same scope will receive the same contribution while this campaign stays active.
audience.floorsHelp: One or more floors, even across buildings.
audience.noBuildings: No buildings found in this compound yet.
audience.noFloors: No floors found in this compound yet.

accounts.title: Apartment contribution accounts
accounts.subtitle: Balances are positive when the apartment owes money and negative when the apartment has credit.
accounts.empty: No contribution accounts have been created yet.

campaigns.title: Contribution campaigns
campaigns.subtitle: Track active and historical contribution requests. Active campaigns automatically apply to future apartments in the selected scope.
campaigns.name: Contribution
campaigns.empty: No contribution campaigns have been created yet.

payments.title: Payment submissions
payments.subtitle: Review resident proof of payment and post approved payments to the ledger.
payments.empty: No payments match the selected status.

degraded.title: Contribution data is loading in degraded mode
degraded.description: Account balances and payment submissions are unavailable while the API is degraded. Recheck the operator status endpoint before assuming there are no pending payments.

reports.title: Collections report
reports.subtitle: Portfolio-wide collections summary, account balances, and payment method breakdown.

accounts.title: Account balances
accounts.empty: No accounts match the selected filter.

paymentMethods.title: Payment methods
paymentMethods.subtitle: Approved payments grouped by payment method.

PollsVoting.title: Polls
PollsVoting.subtitle: Manage polls, elections, and decisions for the compound.
PollsVoting.noVotes: No votes or polls created yet.

transparency.ledgerSubtitle: Admin-ready participation data from the backend voter ledger.
transparency.ledgerEmpty: No participation rows have been recorded yet.
transparency.ledgerUnavailable: The individual participation ledger is unavailable right now.
transparency.anonymousDescription: This vote is configured as anonymous, so the backend intentionally hides the individual voter ledger while still exposing aggregate tally and participation totals.

degraded.title: Poll data is loading in degraded mode
degraded.description: Poll and voting data is unavailable while the API is degraded. Recheck the operator status endpoint before assuming no polls are active.

create.title: Create vote / poll
create.subtitle: Set up a new poll, election, or decision vote for compound residents.
create.compoundLocked: The vote will be created in your assigned compound scope.
create.noCompoundAccess: No compound is available for poll creation yet.

degraded.title: Issues data is loading in degraded mode
degraded.description: The issues list is empty while the API is degraded. Recheck the operator status endpoint before assuming there are no open issues.

degraded.title: Gate data is loading in degraded mode
degraded.description: Visitor request data is unavailable while the API is degraded. Recheck the operator status endpoint before assuming there are no pending entries.

Documents.title: Verification documents
Documents.subtitle: Upload sensitive resident files to the private backend storage disk and review their compliance status.

messages.uploadFailed: Document upload failed. Check API and storage health, then try again.
messages.reviewFailed: Document review failed. Check API availability, then try again.

degraded.title: Document data is loading in degraded mode
degraded.description: The document list and type register are empty while the API is degraded. Recheck the operator status endpoint before assuming the queue is clear.

upload.title: Upload document
upload.disabled: Document upload is temporarily unavailable until the document-type register loads again.

fields.userSearchPlaceholder: Search resident by name, email, or phone
fields.userHelper: Choose the resident. No internal ID lookup needed.
fields.unitSearchPlaceholder: Search apartment code, building, floor, or resident
fields.unitHelper: Optional. Pick the apartment this document belongs to.

AuditLogs.title: Audit logs
AuditLogs.subtitle: Review sensitive API activity by actor, action, request path, status, and timestamp.
AuditLogs.showingLatest: Showing the latest {count} matching audit records.
AuditLogs.empty: No audit records match the selected filters.

SupportConsole.title: Support console
SupportConsole.subtitle: Search users, manage lifecycles, investigate accounts, and handle merges.
SupportConsole.empty: No users match the current filters.

UserDetail.reasonPlaceholder: Provide a reason (required for audit trail)
UserDetail.mergeTargetPlaceholder: Search by name, email, or phone
UserDetail.mergeTargetHelper: Choose the account that should receive the merged history.

AccountMerges.title: Account merges
AccountMerges.subtitle: Review pending and historical account merge requests.
AccountMerges.mergeWarning: This action is irreversible. The source account will be archived after all associations are transferred.

AuditTimeline.title: Investigation timeline
AuditTimeline.subtitle: All audit events related to {entityType} #{entityId}, in chronological order.
AuditTimeline.empty: No audit events found for this entity.

OrgChart.title: Organization Chart
OrgChart.subtitle: Manage representative assignments for buildings, floors, and compound areas.

unassign.title: Unassign representative?
unassign.body: This will remove {name} from the {role} position. The location will become vacant until you assign someone else.

assignment.title: Assign representative
assignment.userSearchPlaceholder: Search by name, email, or phone
assignment.userHelper: Pick the person from search. No internal ID lookup is needed.

form.userSearchPlaceholder: Search by name, email, or phone
form.userHelper: Choose the person. No internal ID lookup needed.
form.scopeSelectPlaceholder: Whole compound or choose a building

Announcements.title: Announcements
Announcements.subtitle: Publish official English and Arabic notices with targeting, archive control, and acknowledgement tracking.

targeting.title: Who should receive it?
targeting.description: Pick the audience in plain property terms. You can select one or many buildings or floors.
targeting.compoundHelp: Everyone with access in this compound.
targeting.floorsHelp: One or more floors, even across buildings.
targeting.noBuildings: No buildings are available for this compound.
targeting.noFloors: No floors are available for this compound.
targeting.unsupported: This announcement uses an older audience type. Its current targeting will be kept when you save changes.

list.title: Notice register
list.subtitle: Official records shown with lifecycle, targeting, and acknowledgement state.
list.empty: No announcements match the selected filters.
list.targetIds: {count, plural, one {# target ID} other {# target IDs}}

fields.photosHelp: Upload one or more JPG, PNG, HEIC, or WebP photos. They will appear in the mobile app for residents who can see this announcement.

acknowledgements.title: Acknowledgement details
acknowledgements.pending: {count, plural, =0 {No pending acknowledgements} one {# pending} other {# pending}}
acknowledgements.empty: No acknowledgements have been recorded yet.

degraded.title: Settings data is loading in degraded mode
degraded.description: System settings could not be loaded from the API. Defaults are shown. Recheck the operator status endpoint before saving changes.

fields.max_visitors_per_unit_per_day: Max visitors per unit per day

Settings.subtitleGlobal: Configure module rules, defaults, and feature toggles across all compounds.
Settings.subtitleCompound: Configure module rules and defaults for {name}.

Import.title: Data import
Import.subtitle: Upload CSV files to import units, users, or opening balances into a compound.
Import.dryRunNote: Dry run validates your file and shows errors without writing any records.

history.title: Import history
history.empty: No imports have been run yet.

messages.dryRunSuccess: Dry run completed. Review the results before running the real import.
messages.failed: Import failed. Check the error details below.

templates.title: CSV templates
templates.subtitle: Download the correct template for the data you want to import.

OnlinePayments.title: Online Payments
OnlinePayments.subtitle: Monitor payment sessions, gateway transactions, and issue refunds

AdvancedFinance.title: Advanced Contributions
AdvancedFinance.subtitle: Manage reserve funds, vendors, budgets, and contribution expenses

CompoundOnboarding.title: Onboarding Checklist
CompoundOnboarding.subtitle: Track setup progress for {name}
CompoundOnboarding.complete: All steps complete - compound is fully configured
CompoundOnboarding.loadError: Could not load checklist. Please try again.

OperationalAnalytics.title: Operational Analytics
OperationalAnalytics.subtitle: Compound-wide metrics across residents, visitors, issues, announcements, and polls.

Security.title: Security Operations
Security.subtitle: Monitor gates, shifts, scanner devices, incidents, and manual visitor entries.
Security.adminAuditSubtitle: Monitor administrative account activity, review security flags, and audit login sessions.

gates.title: Security Gates
gates.subtitle: Entry points configured for this compound.

shifts.title: Security Shifts
shifts.subtitle: Shift schedule, guard assignments, and handover notes.

incidents.title: Security Incidents
incidents.subtitle: Log of all reported security incidents.

manualEntries.title: Manual Visitor Entries
manualEntries.subtitle: Visitor entries processed manually (no QR / no app).

Privacy.title: Privacy & Data Controls
Privacy.subtitle: Manage policy consent, data export requests, legal hold, and user anonymization.

overview.consentDesc: Users acknowledge privacy policy, terms of service, and data processing agreements during onboarding or first login.
overview.apiNote: Consent records are created via the API when users accept policies.
overview.legalHoldDesc: Users under legal hold cannot be anonymized or deleted until the hold is lifted.

policies.title: Policy Types
policies.privacyPolicyDesc: Covers collection, use, and protection of personal data.
policies.termsDesc: Platform usage terms, acceptable use, and liability.
policies.dataProcessingDesc: GDPR-style processing agreement for data subjects.

retention.title: Retention & Anonymization Policy
retention.desc1: Financial records, vote tallies, audit logs, and formal voting decisions are retained indefinitely and are NOT deleted during user anonymization.
retention.desc2: Visitor logs, notifications, and non-financial personal data may be purged according to compound-level retention settings.
retention.desc3: Anonymization scrubs name, email, and phone; the user record is archived and all device sessions are revoked.

WorkOrders.title: Maintenance Work Orders
WorkOrders.subtitle: Track repair and maintenance work orders, vendor estimates, approvals, and completion.

Meetings.title: Association Meetings
Meetings.subtitle: Manage association and committee meetings, agendas, minutes, and action items.

actionItems.title: Action Items
actionItems.subtitle: Track action items across all meetings.

Launch.title: Launch Readiness
Launch.subtitle: Pre-launch health gates, UAT personas, pilot rollout plan, and handover artifacts.
Launch.unavailable: Launch readiness data unavailable. Check API connectivity.

uat.title: UAT Personas
uat.passwordNote: All UAT accounts use password: uat-password-2026

support.title: Support Contacts & Escalation
support.escalationPath: Escalation path: Support Agent → Support Lead → Compound Admin → Technical Lead → Product Owner

CommandBar.searchPlaceholder: Find a page, action, resident, vehicle, or setting…
CommandBar.noResults: No admin page matched that search.
